description: When the heart desires utmost style, you shouldn't deprive it of it! These Mar leather flip-flops from buckaroo offer a fantastic look coupled with unbelievable all-day comfort. If you want to look awesome and feel great, they are your best bet. Team them with jeans or chinos for a perfectly relaxed look. It was never easier to look spectacular, classy and wow! Upper Over-the-foot, wide, full-grain leather straps for added durability and style Thread detailing for added structure and style Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Very well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Horizontal grooves all over the outsole for better grip shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
